channel.title: +वरदाचार्य-शठकोपः on काव्ये विश्वासटिप्पन्यः

item.title: वैकुण्ठ-स्तवः
item.description: 60SLOKAM 39: yt! s<v&t< dzgu[aeÄrsÝtÅvE> yt! s<v&t< dzgu[aeÄrsÝtÅvE> A{f< ctudRzjgd! Évxat&xam, A{fain tTsus†zain prZztain ³IfaivxeStv pirCDdtamgCDn!. 39. yath samvrutam dasaguNOtthara sapta-tatthvai: tatthvai: aNDam chathurdasa-jagad bhavadhAthru-dhAma | aNDAni tath susadrusAni parassathAni aNDAni tath susadrusAni parassathAni aNDAni tath susadrusAni parassathAni kreeDAvidhEs-tava paricchadathAm agacchan || MEANING: The BrahmANDam, the abode of Brahma dEvan, Haran, Indhran et al has seven lower and seven upper lOkams surrounded by the seven tatthvams (Earth/PruTvee, Water/Appu, tEjas, Vaayu, AakAsam, ahankAram and Ma hath).
